scripts.dev:llm:stop: kill $(lsof -ti:4000) 2>/dev/null && echo 'LiteLLM stopped' || echo 'LiteLLM not running'
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:frontend && bun run typecheck:shared
scripts.prisma:migrate:dev: bun run --cwd frontend prisma migrate dev
scripts.prisma:migrate:deploy: bun run --cwd frontend prisma migrate deploy
scripts.prisma:migrate:status: bun run --cwd frontend prisma migrate status
